name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn
State == [p \in 1..N |-> state[p] \in {idle, trying, critical}]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == State /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Initial condition *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> idle]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \* Process p attempts to enter critical section
  \/ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = idle
                    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = trying]
                    /\ turn' = turn
  \* Process p enters critical section if it is its turn
  \/ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = trying
                    /\ turn = p
                    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = critical]
                    /\ turn' = turn
  \* Process p exits critical section and passes turn to next process
  \/ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = critical
                    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = idle]
                    /\ turn' = (p \mod N) + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES participantStates, messages, coordinatorState
TypeOK ==
  /\ coordinatorState \in {"Init", "Prepare", "Commit", "Abort"}
  /\ participantStates \in [Participants -> {"Init", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]
  /\ messages \in [Participants -> {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
  /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
  /\ participantStates = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
  /\ messages = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
     /\ messages = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]
     /\ participantStates' = [p \in Participants |-> "VoteYes"]
     /\ coordinatorState' = "Commit"
     /\ messages' = [p \in Participants |-> "Commit"]
  \/ /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
     /\ messages = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]
     /\ participantStates' = [p \in Participants |-> "VoteNo"]
     /\ coordinatorState' = "Abort"
     /\ messages' = [p \in Participants |-> "Abort"]
  \/ /\ coordinatorState = "Commit"
     /\ messages = [p \in Participants |-> "Commit"]
     /\ participantStates' = [p \in Participants |-> "Commit"]
     /\ coordinatorState' = "Commit"
     /\ messages' = [p \in Participants |-> "Commit"]
  \/ /\ coordinatorState = "Abort"
     /\ messages = [p \in Participants |-> "Abort"]
     /\ participantStates' = [p \in Participants |-> "Abort"]
     /\ coordinatorState' = "Abort"
     /\ messages' = [p \in Participants |-> "Abort"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<coordinatorState, participantStates, messages>> ==

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ state[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = -1
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ state[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        \/ (* No state change *)
          /\ forks' = forks
          /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag, maxNum, minNum


define
  maxNum == MAX \{num[i] : i \in 1..N\}
  minNum == MIN \{num[i] : i \in 1..N\}
  minNum' == IF flag[i] THEN

                  IF maxNum = 0 THEN 1



  maxNum' == IF flag[i] THEN

                  IF maxNum = 0 THEN 1



  flag' == IF flag[i] THEN

                IF maxNum = 0 THEN 1



  num' == IF flag[i] THEN

                IF maxNum = 0 THEN 1



  Next == \E i \in 1..N : /\ flag[i] = FALSE
                     /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                     /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
                     /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
                     /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
  Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
          /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
  Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>
  TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> 0..N]
            /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0

Next == /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ head = tail
            /\ tail < K
            /\ q' = Append(q, 1)
            /\ head' = head + 1
        \/ /\ head < tail
            /\ q' = Tail(q)
            /\ tail' = tail - 1
        \/ /\ head = tail
            /\ tail = K
            /\ q' = <<>>
            /\ head' = 0
            /\ tail' = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys: /\ store' = store
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY
VARIABLES file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_counts, channel

Init ==
    /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) |-> [chunk \in 1..CHUNK_SIZE |-> IF i*CHUNK_SIZE <= Len(file) THEN file[i*CHUNK_SIZE] ELSE 0]]
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_counts = [i \in 1..Len(chunks) |-> 0]
    /\ channel = [i \in 1..Len(chunks) |-> 0]

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ i \notin sent_chunks
        /\ channel[i] = 0
        /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
        /\ sent_chunks' = Append(sent_chunks, i)
        /\ retransmit_counts' = [retransmit_counts EXCEPT ![i] = retransmit_counts[i] + 1]
    \/ \E i \in sent_chunks :
        /\ channel[i] = 1
        /\ \E loss \in {0, 1} :
            /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i] = loss]
            /\ retransmit_counts' = [retransmit_counts EXCEPT ![i] = IF loss = 0 THEN retransmit_counts[i] + 1 ELSE retransmit_counts[i]]
            /\ IF loss = 0 THEN sent_chunks' = sent_chunks ELSE sent_chunks' = sent_chunks

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_counts, channel>>

====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> 
        /\ infected = <<>> 

Next == /\ known' = known
        /\ infected' = infected \cup known

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == \/ /\ free' = free \ {p}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
          /\ p \in free
          /\ c \in Client
          /\ p \in Pages
        \/ /\ free' = free \cup {p}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
          /\ p \in Pages
          /\ c \in Client
          /\ p \in allocated[c]
          /\ p \in Pages

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client: IsFiniteSet(allocated[c])
          /\ \A c \in Client: \A p \in allocated[c]: p \in Pages
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in Client: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] \cap allocated[c2] = {}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>
